svg.title: Module 10 hero: VMware-to-Nutanix migration path
svg.desc: A source vSphere cluster on the left and a target Nutanix cluster on the right, joined by a glowing Move appliance arrow carrying VM glyphs across the gap, with a 7-phase timeline ribbon underneath spanning Discovery, Platform Build, Pilot Wave, Production Wave 1 (low-tier), Wave 2 (Tier-1), Wave 3 (mission-critical), and Stabilization, plus a parallel-running overlap band annotation.

g.text: PARALLEL-RUNNING · BOTH PLATFORMS LIVE FOR 12-18 MONTHS
DISCOVERY → BUILD → PILOT → WAVE 1 → WAVE 2 → WAVE 3 → STABILIZE
phases overlap on purpose · sequence by RISK, not by convenience · pilot before scale
discovery · pilot · waves · cutover · hybrid steady-state · year-2 relationship
